summary: Iteration 42: PageSpeed optimization round 2 testing complete. All optimizations verified: Google Fonts non-render-blocking (media='print' onload trick), font-display:optional, preconnect links for fonts.googleapis.com/fonts.gstatic.com/res.cloudinary.com, cookie banner 3.5s delay, LCP image with fetchPriority='high' and loading='eager', admin panel lazy-loaded via React.lazy, video hover on product cards working.

issues: <link rel=preload> uses an unsupported `as` value - video preload links use as='video' which some browsers don't support (minor, non-blocking)
Hero image preload link in index.html is stripped by CDN - however LCP image has correct fetchPriority='high' and loading='eager' attributes which provides the same optimization benefit

critical_code_review_comments: Google Fonts correctly use media='print' onload='this.media=all' pattern for non-render-blocking loading
font-display:optional is present in all Google Fonts URLs
Preconnect links exist for fonts.googleapis.com, fonts.gstatic.com, res.cloudinary.com, and backend
Cookie consent banner correctly delays 3.5 seconds before appearing (verified: not visible at 0s, not visible at 2s, visible at 4s)
LCP image (Sauna card) has fetchPriority='high' and loading='eager' - correct optimization
Non-LCP image (Balia card) has loading='lazy' - correct optimization
Admin panel lazy-loaded via React.lazy - reduces initial bundle size
Video hover on product cards works correctly - videos play on hover
context_for_next_testing_agent: PageSpeed optimization round 2 complete. Key features verified: 1) Google Fonts non-render-blocking via media='print' onload trick, 2) font-display:optional in font URLs, 3) Preconnect to fonts.googleapis.com, fonts.gstatic.com, res.cloudinary.com, 4) Cookie banner 3.5s delay working, 5) LCP image has fetchPriority='high' and loading='eager', 6) Admin panel lazy-loaded, 7) Video hover on product cards works. Note: Hero image preload in index.html is stripped by CDN but LCP image attributes provide same benefit.

main_landing_loads.details: Main landing page loads with both product cards visible

google_fonts_non_render_blocking.details: Google Fonts link tags have media='all' (after onload swap from media='print')

font_display_optional.details: font-display:optional is present in Google Fonts URLs

cookie_banner_delay.details: Cookie banner appears after ~3.5 seconds (not immediately, not at 2s, visible at 4s)

admin_panel_lazy_loaded.details: Admin panel loads correctly at /admin (lazy-loaded via React.lazy)

admin_login.details: Admin login works with credentials admin/220066

video_hover_sauna.details: Video plays on hover over Sauna product card

video_hover_balia.details: Video plays on hover over Balia product card

robots_txt.details: robots.txt accessible at /robots.txt (CDN serves content signals)

hero_image_preload.details: Preload link exists in index.html but stripped by CDN - LCP image attributes provide same optimization
